jobs

Interns must register themselves for the internship prior to the end of the semester's schedule adjustment period. Obtaining departmental approval for the internship does NOT register the student for the class. Additional information about internships can be picked up from the CCJS advising ofﬁce in Building III, room 5105 or found on the CCJS@USG blog (https:// ccjsusg.blogspot.com/).

Student Societies and Professional Organizations There are two student societies available for membership for CCJS majors: the Criminal Justice Student Association (CRIMSA) and Alpha Phi Sigma Honor Society (APS).
